source_title: GIJN Intro to Investigative Journalism: Data Journalism
author: Purity Mukami, Emilia Díaz-Struck (GIJN)

extracts.extract: Ask who created the data, in other words, determine the source of the data, validate their credentials, and assess their credibility. Read the documentation behind the data source to figure out how the data was gathered. Also determine if the data is from a primary dataset or a secondary dataset created from other data sources.
extracts.relevance_rationale: Evaluating data provenance, creator credentials, and primary vs secondary sources are enduring verification principles

extracts.extract: Data can be verified by cross-referencing it with other datasets, checking other documents, and speaking to experts. Later in the reporting process, journalists should contact the individuals or entities directly mentioned in the datasets for comment and verification.
extracts.relevance_rationale: Cross-referencing data with other datasets and contacting subjects for comment are enduring verification and right-of-reply practices

extracts.extract: If you end up restructuring the data, remember to make a README file, known as a document of instructions, about the data and your methodology. Keep notes of your processes while working with the data. This will help to reduce errors. Keep a copy of the original data — in case of an error, it's possible to trace it to its origin.
extracts.relevance_rationale: Documentation, README files, and keeping original data copies are enduring reproducibility practices

extracts.extract: Keep a data diary of the steps taken to arrive at a value or insight. This will help during fact-checking or if you are asked questions by editors — or lawyers.
extracts.relevance_rationale: Keeping a data diary for accountability and fact-checking is an enduring documentation practice

extracts.extract: Also, use self-referencing and reproducible processes to answer questions later. These could include the use of Excel formulas instead of copy-pasting data; the use of programming codes; the use of a GitHub repository or other methods to keep track of the work.
extracts.relevance_rationale: Reproducible processes via formulas and code endure but should now mention LLM-assisted code generation and chat-based audit trails

extracts.extract: If someone has done an analysis, reproduce the analysis to verify that the same results are obtained. Here, a secondary person to reproduce the analysis and help fact-check is crucial.
extracts.relevance_rationale: Reproducing analysis independently for verification is an enduring fact-checking principle

extracts.extract: When sharing data with other organizations or even your teammates in-house, make sure you are transparent about where the data was sourced, how it was analyzed, and the limitations of the data.
extracts.relevance_rationale: Transparency about sourcing, analysis methods, and data limitations when sharing is an enduring collaborative principle

extracts.extract: It is also important to consider writing a methodology companion piece that explains the nature of the data, and how the work with the data was conducted.
extracts.chapter: From data to the story: a checklist
extracts.relevance_rationale: Publishing methodology companion pieces for transparency is an enduring best practice

extracts.extract: Always treat data the way you treat human sources — interview the data. Ask yourself, what questions can the data answer, and document how you arrive at those answers.
extracts.relevance_rationale: Treating data as a source to interview with critical questions is an enduring analytical metaphor and practice

extracts.extract: Audiences don't always care about raw data so it takes careful and creative storytelling and visual presentation for the data to make sense. Mapping the findings into a storyboard helps organize and define the aspects of a good story such as the characters, the conflict, the plot, the structure, etc.
extracts.chapter: From data to the story: a checklist
extracts.relevance_rationale: Storyboarding and narrative structure for data stories are enduring storytelling craft principles
